title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene.
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V2
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V2
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: Aerial Shot of Burning Military Vehicle in Urban Warfare V2
description: Cinematic drone footage capturing the aftermath of urban battle. Showcases Seedance 2.0's ability to generate realistic war scenes with detailed destruction effects and atmospheric rendering. V2
prompt: A cinematic drone sequence over a war-torn city intersection. At the center, a destroyed armored vehicle burns continuously, emitting thick black smoke that climbs into an overcast sky. Streets are littered with rubble, twisted metal, and shattered concrete; nearby buildings show blown-out windows, scorched facades, and structural damage. Start with a high establishing aerial shot, then descend slowly into a medium-high orbit while preserving spatial scale and destruction detail. Keep color grading desaturated with documentary realism, add subtle film grain, and ensure physically believable fire, smoke turbulence, heat distortion, and airborne dust.

title: IMAX-Style Desert Sandstorm Scene with Denis Villeneuve Aesthetic V2

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V3
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V3
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V4
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V4
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V5
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V5
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V6
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V6
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V7
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V7
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: 1-Minute Cinematic War Video in 5 Minutes, multi-shot structure V8
description: Generate a 1-minute cinematic war video in 5 minutes with a multi-shot structure. Realistic Middle Eastern desert village infantry combat scene. V8
prompt: Consistent style guideline for all shots: realistic cinematic war footage in a modern Middle Eastern desert village; dominant sandy yellow and gray-brown palette; harsh noon sunlight with hard shadows; drifting dust and gunpowder smoke; subtle handheld vibration; low-angle and ground-level framing to maximize tension and realism; modern light infantry gear without visible national identifiers; restrained, tense, and brutal atmosphere. Shot 1 : A modern infantry squad advances through narrow alleys between low adobe houses and damaged concrete walls. The camera tracks from behind at knee level, pushing forward as soldiers hug the walls and aim toward an unseen corner. Wind, distant metal clinks, and suspended dust establish dread. Shot 2 : A sudden close-quarters firefight erupts at the alley corner. Soldiers drop and press against the wall as rounds impact masonry, kicking up debris. Fast lateral camera pan with controlled shake, intermittent muzzle flashes, and silhouettes in broken windows increase claustrophobia and urgency. Shot 3 : The squad regains formation and enters a half-collapsed building. Over-shoulder follow shot into dim interior where shafts of sunlight cut through breached walls. Dust particles float in the beams; hand signals replace speech; distant gunfire echoes. Tone shifts from chaos to hyper-alert silence. Shot 4 : From a damaged rooftop, the squad secures a high vantage point over the village grid. Slow pullback in backlight, soldiers in silhouette with rifles still trained on unknown threats. Dust swirls in warm light; no clear victory or defeat. End on unresolved tension.

title: Aerial Shot of Burning Military Vehicle in Urban Warfare V8
description: Cinematic drone footage capturing the aftermath of urban battle. Showcases Seedance 2.0's ability to generate realistic war scenes with detailed destruction effects and atmospheric rendering. V8
prompt: A cinematic drone sequence over a war-torn city intersection. At the center, a destroyed armored vehicle burns continuously, emitting thick black smoke that climbs into an overcast sky. Streets are littered with rubble, twisted metal, and shattered concrete; nearby buildings show blown-out windows, scorched facades, and structural damage. Start with a high establishing aerial shot, then descend slowly into a medium-high orbit while preserving spatial scale and destruction detail. Keep color grading desaturated with documentary realism, add subtle film grain, and ensure physically believable fire, smoke turbulence, heat distortion, and airborne dust.
